name: second-opinion
description: Get a second opinion from Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview via the locally installed Gemini CLI. Use this skill when in Plan Mode for large or critical tasks, when stuck on a debugging dead end, when facing architecture trade-offs, for subtle edge cases in code review, or any situation where an independent perspective would add value. Also use when the user explicitly asks for a "second opinion", "ask Gemini", "another perspective", or "cross-check this". This skill only uses gemini-3.1-pro-previ
author: peterkrueck
